turns.content: Hey, what's the capital of Japan?
The capital of Japan is Tokyo.
Cool. What time zone is Tokyo in?
Tokyo is in Japan Standard Time, which is UTC plus nine hours. They don't observe daylight saving time.
Can you convert 72 degrees Fahrenheit to Celsius for me?
72 degrees Fahrenheit is about 22.2 degrees Celsius.
You're welcome! Have a good one.
